Secure exam workspace

Online assessments that feel calm, clear, and reliable.

OEPS gives students a focused test experience while helping exam teams manage assignments, proctoring signals, and results from one place.

01
Focused exam flow

Auto-save, question navigation, and a cleaner workspace that keeps attention on the test.

02
Built-in monitoring

Tab switches and focus changes are logged without adding noise to the student experience.

03
Simple operations

Create exams, assign students, review submissions, and publish outcomes in the same workspace.
